name: agent-native-baseline
description: The agent-native project setup: an AGENTS.md contract, docs + RFCs, linters + pre-commit + security scanning, CI, and a .claude agents/commands library — the setup agent-native-setup scaffolds by default.

prompts.name: languages
prompts.message: Languages — linters, formatters, type-checkers and test wiring ship only for these:

prompts.name: tools
prompts.message: AI assistants to target (each gets a config pointing at AGENTS.md):

prompts.name: include_agents
prompts.message: Agents & commands? (.claude/ subagents code-reviewer and planner, plus the /review and /rfc commands — Claude only)

prompts.name: include_docs
prompts.message: Docs & RFCs? (docs/architecture, the docs/rfc lifecycle + template, CONTRIBUTING.md)

prompts.name: include_quality
prompts.message: Linters & quality? (per-language linters/formatters/tests behind one `quality` command)

prompts.name: include_ci
prompts.message: CI (GitHub Actions)? (a workflow running that same gate on every push and PR)

prompts.name: include_security
prompts.message: Security scanning? (gitleaks secret scan - https://gitleaks.io - in the pre-commit hook and CI, plus a per-language dependency audit that runs in CI only)

prompts.name: github_actions
prompts.message: GitHub Actions workflows? (writes .github/workflows/quality.yml — the only CI backend this profile ships)

prompts.name: hooks
prompts.message: Pre-commit hooks? (lint, format and secret-scan each commit; tests before push. Needs pre-commit - https://pre-commit.com - armed once with `pre-commit install`)

prompts.name: runner
prompts.message: Task runner hosting lint/format/typecheck/test/quality — 'make' needs nothing installed, 'task' needs go-task (https://taskfile.dev):

prompts.name: adopt
prompts.message: Gate for an existing repo's code — 'progressive' checks only files changed in a PR (recommended for a mature repo), 'full' enforces on the whole repo now, 'none' writes the config but enforces nothing:
